content: PDF parsing for RAG: pymupdf4llm (0.12s/doc, clean Markdown, preserves structure, LangChain-native) is the best balance for serverless RAG. unstructured (1.3s, semantic chunks, heavy deps including optional LibreOffice) is too heavy for Vercel installs. pypdf (0.024s but spacing artifacts, no structure awareness) is inferior. Recommendation: pymupdf4llm for PDF, python-docx for DOCX. Chunking: LangChain RecursiveCharacterTextSplitter (800 chars, 100 overlap) - already available, no new package. Semantic chunking burns LLM quota and adds latency; not appropriate for free-tier portfolio demo.
